SHOTGUN STANDOFF

Welcome to Shotgun Standoff - a deadly game of Russian Roulette in an underground arena. Face off against The Dealer in a high-stakes battle where both of you take turns with a loaded shotgun. The shotgun contains a mix of live rounds and blanks. Use items strategically to gain information and survive. Win two rounds to claim victory, but lose your health and it's game over. Only one walks away.

Arrow Keys: Navigate menu | Space: Confirm selection | Z: Quick shoot self | Shift: Quick shoot dealer | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_2.test_description: Strategic win test that implements optimal decision-making. Uses items intelligently to gain information about shell types and maximize survival probability. Aims to defeat The Dealer.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use magnifying glass to check next shell when available. If next shell is blank, shoot self for extra turn. If live, shoot dealer. Use handsaw to double damage before shooting dealer with live rounds. Use cigarettes to heal when low on health.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat The Dealer by winning 2 rounds before losing all health. The test should demonstrate intelligent item usage and decision-making leading to a GAME_OVER_WIN state.
